projects.name: Street Born, Runway Ready.  That's TITE.
projects.blurb: We built TITE from the ground up — no investors, no shortcuts, just pure street energy and style. Now it’s time to take that raw vision to the runway. At TITE, we’re turning bold, wearable art into a movement — and with your support, we’re bringing it to Fashion Week.

projects.name: MIRA Dial - The Focus Tool You Can't Cheat
projects.blurb: A physical dial that locks every screen you own into focus and won't let you quit early.

projects.name: Open the Doors to The Velvet Pony - Charleston's newest queer bar
projects.blurb: The Velvet Pony is the newest queer bar in North Charleston, South Carolina, and we need your help to open the doors this summer.

projects.name: MILF Massacre
projects.blurb:
Youth comes at a price.

After a freak lightning strike fuses an experimental beauty mask to the face of a vain beauty club leader, she begins a bloody rampage to preserve her youth forever. As bodies pile up, three friends and a sarcastic tattooed shop owner race to uncover the truth behind the legend of the Spa Day Slasher before they become her next beauty treatment.

projects.name: SENO HyperCool Ultra-Thin Phone Cooler, Semiconductor Cooling Fan for Smartphones
projects.blurb: SENO HyperCool uses advanced semiconductor (TEC) cooling technology to rapidly reduce smartphone temperature, delivering stable performance, smoother gaming, and longer device lifespan — all in a compact, ultra-quiet design.

projects.name: SHUTTER: A Supernatural Thriller
projects.blurb: Following a tragedy that unlocks a dark supernatural ability, a teen is sent to live with her estranged mother in a remote mountain town. As a deadly threat closes in, she must decide whether this power will destroy her—or save the town before it's too late. Starring McKinley Blehm and Casey Simpson.

projects.name: Trellis Suite
projects.blurb: Most businesses are held together by people compensating for operational gaps that were never clearly structured in the first place. Trellis is a new operational structure platform designed to help businesses organize and run on the structure they actually depend on.

projects.name: Places I Go from My Bed
projects.blurb:
"Places I Go from My Bed" is an original work of object theater conceived for young audiences with illnesses and disabilities, but enjoyable to all.  

Created by Carmen Martinez, Katherine McGerr and Erica Murphy, it transforms objects from a child’s hospital room into a fantastic and immersive adventure that empowers audiences to travel in their own imaginations from wherever they are.  

Support from Syracuse University and Upstate University Hospital will cover travel to a local hospital and to the Edinburgh Fringe Festival in 2026; we seek additional funds to support marketing and additional travel to widen our reach. 

Help us bring joy to more young audience members with specific mobility needs!
projects.creator_name: Places I Go from My Bed

projects.name: SweetSoil Foods
projects.blurb: Sweetsoil Foods helps organic growers sell dried produce to consumers without additional time-spend or cost. Our dried goods reach snack, beverage, and home kitchen markets whose consumers value fruit and vegetable ingredients with no additives or preservatives all year round.

projects.name: AirTrek SmartBag
projects.blurb: Travel smarter with AirTrek SmartBag – the 3-in-1 backpack and trolley with built-in electric compression. Save space, organize effortlessly, and carry your essentials in style. Perfect for work trips, weekend getaways, or long adventures.

projects.name: Sun Flower Umbrella
projects.blurb:
Tired of moving tables, chairs and loungers to follow the shade? Help us bring Sun Flower Umbrella into production and let the shade follow you while you relax.

Always in the shade, always in control.

projects.blurb:
DebuggAI Tech is developed by:

We are building a structured AI infrastructure designed to empower entrepreneurs, founders, and organizations. www.debuggai.tech

This is a scalable AI ecosystem.

Debug smarter. Build faster. Scale securely.
An AI-powered command center designed to eliminate costly bugs, optimize architecture, and accelerate product launches. Join Early Access

projects.name: Luggin
projects.blurb: Luggin is a solution that fosters the unused capacity of air travellers into a decentralised global network. It aims to be the first secure global air crowdshipping network. Every day, millions of travelers carry unused baggage while international shipping costs skyrocket, air transport regulations become increasingly stringent, small parcel taxes tighten, fuel prices soar, and air travel becomes more and more polluting. Luggin connects travelers with available baggage space with shippers seeking faster and cheaper delivery, or with passengers on the same flight who have excess baggage. The result for users is revenue for travellers, reduced costs for shippers or passengers with excess baggage, and an optimised carbon footprint.

projects.name: We The Sheeple Burning Man 2026
projects.blurb: Welcome to the sheep show! We The Sheeple is an art project coming to Burning Man 2026 reflecting on the volatile state of the electorate; how rhetoric and the weaponization of the media are swaying the electorate as easily as the wind blows. Intellectually serious yet physically whimsical. Red, white, and ewe.

projects.name: H.A.M.U. high-accuracy measurement unit
projects.blurb: The HAMU are designed for measurement of the DC, low frequency, pulse, and stepped signals of voltage with a high signal-to-noise ratio while operating over a wide range of ambient temperatures. It is a universal small-sized sealed unit with external functional connectors. HAMU can be used as an independent device and as part of high-accuracy and/or high-sensitive measurement systems. It was created to make high-accuracy measurement not only affordable and easy to use, but also an excellent tool for anyone interested in measurement electronics.

projects.name: Crazy Mama Heads to Off-Broadway, NYC
projects.blurb: Crazy Mama is a true story inspired by Sharon Scott Williams’ award-winning memoir.  Her short memoir about growing up with a paranoid schizophrenic mother in a southern railroad town have won numerous literary awards and serve as the inspiration for the upcoming theatrical New York City Premiere of Crazy Mama: A True Story of Love and Madness.

projects.name: Yeti Ready — The Go-Bag That Makes Survival Fun
projects.blurb: Tactical go-bags built for real emergencies and real personalities. Because being prepared shouldn't be scary, overwhelming, or boring — it should be fun. The Apocalypse, But Make It Fun.

projects.name: Jovie Car Seat: Height-Adjustable Car Seat for Kids
projects.blurb: An adjustable baby car seat for children with adjustable height from 100-150cm, designed to grow with your child and ensure a secure, proper seat belt fit for lasting safety and comfort.

projects.name: Help Bring Blean to Life!
projects.blurb: Support the development of a portable cleaning solution that empowers menstrual cup and disc users with privacy, convenience, and confidence on the go

projects.name: Repair Ninja
projects.blurb: Simplify rental property maintenance with Repair Ninja—automated repair requests, vendor coordination, real-time updates, and easy expense tracking for landlords and property managers.

projects.name: Lights & Shadows Cold Brew
projects.blurb: Cold-brewed iced tea with variety of botanicals, collagen, and natural honey or sugar free - crafted for a healthier modern lifestyle.

projects.name: The Shape Between Us
projects.blurb: Kai and Casey have been best friends for years, they're basically the same person. But when Casey's new boyfriend enters the picture, Kai's need to belong blurs the lines between care and obsession, threatening the safety of friendship.

projects.name: OncoBag
projects.blurb: After breast cancer surgery, millions of women face a painful choice: wear visible medical sleeves that mark them as patients, or skip their daily wellness routine. OncoBag is the world's first handbag with built-in vibration massage — designed with breast cancer survivors to bring comfort, confidence, and discretion back into everyday life. Co-created with oncological physiotherapists and women who've been there.

projects.name: Chimera Productions Presents JOB by Max Wolf Friedlich
projects.blurb:
Chimera Productions brings to the stage Max Wolf Friedlich's electrifying psychological thriller, JOB — a taut, 80-minute drama that grips you from the opening moment and never lets go. Set in pre-pandemic 2020 in the Bay Area, the play unfolds entirely within a single therapy session. Jane, a young woman placed on leave after a breakdown at her Big Tech job went viral, will do almost anything to get back to work. Her new therapist, Lloyd, holds the power to authorize her return — but the more they talk, the more the power dynamics between them twist and unravel in unexpected ways.
A sharp, darkly funny, and unsettling examination of our addiction to work, the internet, and the cost of modern life, JOB asks what we owe each other — and what we're willing to sacrifice to belong.

projects.name: Passive Paper Mill Project Innovation Hub 2.0
projects.blurb: After 25 years inside the global textile industry, I came to Portugal searching for a more human way of living and making — and discovered that textile waste could become a powerful tool for preserving heritage craft instead of contributing to landfill. This project will transform a protected 750m² historic paper mill into a cultural innovation hub dedicated to turning discarded materials into meaningful objects through Portuguese arts, craftsmanship, experimentation, and regenerative education.

projects.name: Nueva arquitectura de generación eléctrica basada en hidrógeno para energía limpia 24/7
projects.blurb: Desarrollo de un reactor de hidrógeno de alta eficiencia. Proyecto para desarrollar y validar un nuevo concepto de generación eléctrica basado en hidrógeno. Con un rendimiento teórico superior al 70% y mínimas pérdidas mecánicas. Una nueva forma de producir energía más económica y sostenible. Tras más de 10 años de desarrollo, el prototipo ya es una realidad, la siguiente fase permitirá escalar, validar y cuantificar el sistema. Para llegar ahí necesitamos vuestro apoyo.

projects.name: PFM Module | Zafira B & Astra H module to fold mirrors
projects.blurb: Custom build micro-controller for automatically folding and unfolding power folding mirrors on Opel/Vauxhall Astra H/Zafira B upon closing/opening the car with car's remote (key fob).

projects.blurb: Help us to produce the pilot episode of 'The Wicklow Gatehouse'

projects.name: Legend Of Serenity: Everland's Rising Saviors
projects.blurb: Legend of Serenity: Everland's Rising Saviors (otherwise known as LOS:ERS) is an audio drama taking place in the fantasy land of Everland. Four convicted criminals and two royal guards are gathered together by the Queen of Asoppia to retrieve four magical artifacts within the span of four weeks. Joined together by destiny, and forced to stay together by a death sentence, the six must learn to put their differences aside in order to save the life of their Princess- and thus, themselves.

projects.name: Into The Breech the Exiles March
projects.blurb: A series of short stories and ideas that are guaranteed to excite you. From the Romans to modern criminal syndicates. The brutal fighting on the of the eastern front and those trying to do some good in all the chaos. A crumbling empire brought back to life by time traveling warriors and the steady thinking of a rival king. The power of beauty to deflect any accusations. Alternate history and imagination. With a variety of stories there is something for you guaranteed.

projects.blurb: CNS Profile | Nervous System Balance | Supplement Guidance. Get your personalized CNS Profile report and make supplement choices based on your nervous system’s functional priorities.

projects.name: Οι Ειδικοί / The Experts
projects.blurb:
ΣΥΝΤΟΜΗ ΠΕΡΙΛΗΨΗ / SHORT SUMMARY
ΕΝ
In a traditional café in Thessaloniki, four old friends reunite, each shaped by a different path in life.
As they attempt to discuss the important issues of society, an unexpected event interrupts them, revealing more than their words ever could.

GR
Σε ένα παραδοσιακό καφενείο στη Θεσσαλονίκη, τέσσερις παλιοί φίλοι συναντιούνται ξανά, κουβαλώντας διαφορετικές πορείες ζωής.
Καθώς προσπαθούν να μιλήσουν για τα σημαντικά ζητήματα της κοινωνίας, ένα απρόσμενο γεγονός διακόπτει τη ροή τους, αποκαλύπτοντας περισσότερα από όσα μπορούν να ειπωθούν.

projects.name: Type-stylus
projects.blurb: Blue Dimension was founded to create artificial intelligence of researchers and developers required to build real world automation platforms. BluDim plans to work on its goals making its programs incrementally smarter and more fundamental  requiring less training assistance for developing specialized problem solving platforms. BluDim artificial intelligence plans to create programs to solve input, data, type generation, type rewriting and function output constraints efficiently at multiple level of specification details.

projects.name: The Carnal Contract
projects.blurb: Trying to get 1,500.00 up for a Platinum Package to turn her into a Paperback and Hardcover registered with the Library of Congress! As a dedicated novelist, I am delighted to announce that I have recently completed a manuscript that I commenced working on in the fall of last year. The manuscript is available for review at https://thecarnalcontract.my.canva.site/. I am currently exploring publishing options with three companies and require assistance to bring my creation to fruition and secure copyright protection. I am offering a complimentary copy to contributors who pledge $80 or more, as well as to those who secure three or more contributors at $25 each. I'm looking forward to making this a lifetime endeavor, so there are more novels to be completed and released. Thank you.

projects.name: SqueakPoint
projects.blurb: SqueakPoint™ is a patent‑pending, battery‑free training sleeve that teaches young athletes proper form using engineered compression and an instant audible cue. Born from my 10 year old daughter, a gymnast’s accidental discovery, it’s a simple, durable, eco‑friendly solution built on biomechanics and real‑world movement science.

projects.name: Help 1000 Rescue Pets Across 10 Shelters Find Identity, Donors, and Forever Homes
projects.blurb: Philippine rescue shelters are tired and unfunded. Furbly is building the infrastructure that connects 12M street animals to the people who want to save them. Help us microchip 500 rescue pets, support 10 partner shelters, and launch the country's first pet identity registry. 100% to the rescues.

projects.name: Technical Pickleball Clothing Co.
projects.blurb: Creating a middle to high end  athletic shirt for pickleball that separates you from tennis clothing. We will have two lines to present. One will be a special really light fabric that is made with SPF 20-25% and 4 way stretch. The other fabric will be fabric from sustainable sources also using coffee grounds in the process to create the fabric. This shirt will be a cross over from a bike jersey with pockets on the back, to allow the user to hold a pickleball or sunglasses etc…

projects.name: Junkie Bass Studios — Building an Accessible Creative Ecosystem
projects.blurb: Junkie Bass Studios is more than a studio. It is an interconnected creative ecosystem built around accessibility, owned IP, community content, and long-term independence. This campaign helps scale the infrastructure that allows every part of that system to grow together.

projects.name: Bucatca green, un passo verso un mondo più sostenibile
projects.blurb:
Bucatca Green – Un passo verso un mondo più sostenibile

Il progetto
Il progetto BUCATCA GREEN nasce con una visione chiara: creare un futuro più sostenibile, in cui l'edilizia non solo rispetta l'ambiente, ma lo valorizza. Fondato da un artigiano con anni di esperienza, il progetto combina innovazione e rispetto per la natura. La nostra missione è offrire una soluzione concreta per ridurre l'impatto ambientale nell'edilizia, utilizzando materiali naturali al 100% per finiture ecologiche di alta qualità.

Il cuore del prodotto
Il rasante BUCATCA GREEN è un rasante innovativo a base di terra, arricchito con silicato di potassio, che riduce le emissioni di CO2 e garantisce una finitura stabile, durevole e perfetta. Il prodotto è frutto di anni di ricerca e sviluppo, unendo passione per la natura e desiderio di creare una soluzione sostenibile che rispetti l’ambiente e riduca l’impronta ecologica delle costruzioni.
È perfetto per chi cerca un’alternativa eco-friendly senza compromessi su qualità, performance ed estetica.
Un movimento, non solo un prodotto
BUCATCA GREEN coinvolge artigiani, professionisti e persone che credono nel potere del cambiamento, nella sostenibilità e nel contributo individuale. La nostra comunità mira a creare una rete di costruzioni verdi, promuovendo materiali naturali a basse emissioni e generando un impatto positivo sull’ambiente e sulle future generazioni.

Il nostro obiettivo
Non ci fermiamo al prodotto ecologico: vogliamo costruire un futuro migliore, dove l'edilizia rispetta la terra e diventa parte di un ecosistema equilibrato. Con BUCATCA GREEN, ogni gesto è un passo verso un mondo più sano e sostenibile. Ogni sacco di rasante che produciamo è un piccolo contributo per proteggere il pianeta e costruire insieme, con passione e responsabilità, un futuro migliore per tutti.
